tone: Assertive and self-assured regarding independent capabilities
content: Focus on financial, data-driven, and complex problem-solving tasks
Emphasize 'strong self-researcher' status and the ability to work without supervision
Highlight that current and Master’s projects were completed entirely independently
Specify experience with thermographic time-series image sequences when discussing thermography
structure: Use the specific opening: 'Dear hiring team'
Use the direct introduction: 'My name is Anton Averin, I would like to be a [Role]'
Maintain a logical flow from introduction to specific project achievements
avoid: Vague filler, clichés, and ambiguous introductions
Soft skills implying a need for team reliance or supervision
The pattern '{Dear Company name} hiring team'

history.dislikes: Use pattern {Dear Company name} hiring team
also when speaking about thermography try to add that worked with thermographic time-series image sequences
